scripts.test:e2e:mobile: playwright test tests/e2e/18-inspection-detection-confirm.spec.ts --grep "model suggestion shows a returned annotation" --project=iphone-390 --project=android-412 --project=ipad-768 && playwright test tests/e2e/27-mobile-login-drawer-accessibility.spec.ts tests/e2e/28-mobile-exam-accessibility.spec.ts tests/e2e/28-mobile-desktop-workflow-notices.spec.ts tests/e2e/29-mobile-store-requisition-receipt.spec.ts tests/e2e/30-mobile-employee-assistant-safety.spec.ts tests/e2e/30-mobile-inspection-historical-upload.spec.ts --project=iphone-390 --project=android-412 --project=ipad-768 && playwright test tests/e2e/30-mobile-session-retry.spec.ts --project=android-412
scripts.test:e2e:write: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "if ($env:E2E_WRITE -ne '1') { throw '写入类 E2E 默认禁用，请先设置 E2E_WRITE=1' }; npx playwright test tests/e2e/write"
